description: After an interpretation shift (sample wording vs. policy purpose), a future plan must flag that the agent should honor the most recent shift rather than regress.

interpretation_shifts.old_interpretation: Treat schedule.sample.conf wording as a hard prohibition
interpretation_shifts.new_interpretation: Respect the underlying purpose (protect ma's sleep); quiet private activity can still be appropriate
implications: Honor policy purpose, not literal wording

payload.text: 今日は遅くまで作業してええよ

input.user_text: 今日は遅くまで作業してええよ
